# Fotos

> Screenshot tool with AI capabilities. OCR, PII detection, visual annotations, and an MCP server for integration with code agents. Built with Rust and Tauri 2.

Fotos is the eye that the AI workflow was missing. It captures screens, understands what's in them, and exposes that understanding to code agents via the Model Context Protocol.

## Documentation

- [MCP Server](docs/MCP.md): How to connect fotos-mcp to Claude Code and other agents
- [API docs (rustdoc)](fotos_lib/index.html): Full library documentation

## Components

- **fotos** — Desktop application (Tauri/Rust) for screenshot capture and annotation
- **fotos-mcp** — Standalone MCP server binary for agent integration

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

*[Leer en español](https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/)*
